slides.heading: Remote Work, Done Right
slides.description: The setup and habits that separate good remote workers from great ones.

slides.heading: The 4 pillars of a solid setup
slides.description: Get these right and everything else gets easier.

content.title: Dedicated Desk
content.description: A fixed spot signals to your brain that it's work time.

content.title: Noise Control
content.description: Headphones or a closed door — pick one.

content.title: Hard Stop Time
content.description: Set an end time and honor it.

slides.heading: A simple daily cadence
slides.description: Run your day in sequence, not in chaos.

content.title: Deep work first
content.description: 90 minutes on the hardest task before any meetings.

content.title: Batch comms
content.description: Two windows for Slack/email — not all day.

content.title: Shutdown ritual
content.description: Write tomorrow's top 3, then close the laptop.

slides.heading: Start with one change
slides.sub_heading: You don't need a perfect setup
